arts.ttl: Team News: Real Madrid vs. Real Sociedad injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Copa del Rey clash between Real Madrid and Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti’s stance on his Real Madrid future ‘appears to be changing’
arts.sum: A major update on the future of Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Monday come to the fore online. This comes amid confirmation that the Italian is beginning…

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney reveals how he spurned approaches from Real Madrid and Barcelona as Man United legend urges Liverpool fans to lay off Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has revealed just how close he came to leaving Man United for Spain and says he can understand why Trent Alexander-Arnold may be tempted to join Real Madrid this summer.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Q&A: Arsenal, Ancelotti’s Future, Pressing, Xabi, Barca ‘Style’ PR
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani jumps live on YouTube to interact with fans and answer questions, which touched on all things Real Madrid and their current state. It also serves as a means for Real Madrid fans to connect and discuss the team.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappé: “I want to win everything I can with Real Madrid”
arts.sum: Mbappé, who arrived at Real Madrid last year after so many years of negotiations, claims he wants to win the Champions League and every other title at the club. Real Madrid forward Kylian Mbappé claims he wants to win everything possible with the club in a recent interview with La Sexta.

arts.ttl: Rio Ferdinand sends message to Liverpool fans amid hostility shown towards Trent Alexander-Arnold over his impending Real Madrid move - and blames club's board
arts.sum: Reds supporters have publicly vented their anger at the decision, claiming their academy graduate is turning his back on his boyhood club for nothing.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold endures AWKWARD return to Liverpool training as he nears Real Madrid move
arts.sum: With the international break done and dusted, the Reds return to Premier League action on Wednesday with a crucial Merseyside derby against bitter rivals Everton.
